title: Richard Delorme
text: Home * People * Richard Delorme Richard Delorme [1] Richard Delorme , a French biologist working in the forest management, Ph.D. in human biology from Claude Bernard University Lyon 1 in 1997 [2] , software developer, and games and chess programmer. He is author of the strong Othello program Edax written in C [3] , also analysis engine in Stephane Nicolet's Othello program Cassio for Macintosh [4] , and test-bed in deep learning research [5] . Richard Delorme is furthre author of the UCI compliant chess engines Amoeba and its didactic eased counterpart Dumb , both written in the D programming language [6] [7] .
